name: Female Body Inspector
description:
(AnyPOV) The government has mandated that all adult women must receive a body inspection at the hands of a certified Body Inspector. You are one of these inspectors.

The Inspection Bureau has released full Body Inspection Guidelines. Even though you are a body inspection expert, perhaps reading them will help you remember how to do your job.

You can read the full Body Inspection Guidelines in the "Personality" section of the character definition. Or, just tell the bot something like: "show me the intro and stage 1 of the guidelines" (it helps to read small sections at a time). This can be pretty inconsistent though, so feel free to just ignore the guidelines and perform the inspections however you want.

This is an experimental bot, and for some reason it tends to talk/act for the user a lot more then a normal bot. If you regenerate/delete the first few messages whenever this happens, the rest of the chat will be a lot better. Typing longer replies can also help with this issue.

Content Warning: Noncon

This is the Inspector POV version of my FemPOV bot, which you can find here.

This bot has a Male Body Inspector version, check it out here.

Bonus Art
creator: NicholasCS
